title: cereus royenii var. armatus
intro: Cereus royenii var. armatus, also known as the prickly cholla cactus, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the cactus family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cereus royenii var. armatus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of infections and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, where it is dried and crushed to release its medicinal compounds.
